questionText: Does the policy framework for the portfolio activities of your organization include environmental requirements that clients/investees need to meet, and/or exclusion policies?
questionKo: 정책 프레임워크 에 대한 포트폴리오 activities of 귀사에 environmental requirements that 고객/투자대상 need to meet, 및/또는 exclusion policies이/가 포함됩니까?
simpleHelp: Considering environmental issues in an organization's policy framework is an important element of business strategy and a signal of how deeply environmental issues are embedded in an organization's processes. For these reasons, data users are interested in understanding whether organizations in the financial services sector have integrated environmental requirements for clients/investees, and whether financial institutions have implemented any environmental exclusion policies.

columns.text: Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies
options: Yes, our policies include environmental requirements that clients/investees need to meet
Yes, we have exclusion policies for industries, activities and/or locations exposed or contributing to environmental risks
Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental client/investee requirements and environmental exclusion policies
No, but we plan to include environmental requirements and/or exclusion policies in our policy framework in the next two years
No, and we do not plan to include environmental requirements and/or exclusion policies in our policy framework in the next two years
columns.textKo: 정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies
optionsKo: Yes, our policies include environmental requirements that 고객/투자대상 need to meet
Yes, we have exclusion policies for industries, activities 및/또는 locations exposed 또는 contributing to environmental risks
Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental 고객/투자대상 requirements 및 environmental exclusion policies
No, but we plan to include environmental requirements 및/또는 exclusion policies in our 정책 프레임워크 in the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to include environmental requirements 및/또는 exclusion policies in our 정책 프레임워크 in the next two years

columns.text: Primary reason for not including both policies with environmental client/investee requirements and environmental exclusion policies in your policy framework for portfolio activities
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 for not 포함 both policies with environmental 고객/투자대상 requirements 및 environmental exclusion policies in your 정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities
optionsKo: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, 또는 expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant 또는 not relevant

columns.text: Explain why the policy framework for your portfolio activities does not include both policies with environmental client/investee requirements and environmental exclusion policies
columns.textKo: 그 이유를 설명 the 정책 프레임워크 귀사의 포트폴리오 activities does not include both policies with environmental 고객/투자대상 requirements 및 environmental exclusion policies

guidance.text:
This question appears for organizations in the Financial Services sector who report in 1.10 that they undertake banking, investing and "General (non-life)" insurance underwriting activities. The question does not appear for organizations who report that they only insure "Life and/or Health". 
Rows are presented according to the reported organizational activities.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 appears for organizations in the Financial Services sector who report in 1.10 that they undertake banking, investing 및 "일반 (non-life)" insurance underwriting activities. The 문항 does not appear for organizations who report that they only insure "Life 및/또는 Health". 행 are presented according to the 보고 organizational activities.

guidance.text:
General 
Subsequent questions ask for more details on these policies within the framework.
Explain why the policy framework for your portfolio activities does not include both policies with environmental client/investee requirements and environmental exclusion policies (column 3) 
This column is presented for any selection other than "Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental client/investee requirements and environmental exclusion policies" in column 1 "Policy framework for portfolio activities…".
Provide a company-specific explanation of why the policy framework for your portfolio activities does not include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies. If "No, but we plan to include environmental requirements and/or exclusion policies in our policy framework in the next two years" is selected, explain the plan and timeframe for implementation.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Subsequent questions ask for more details on these policies within the framework. 그 이유를 설명 the 정책 프레임워크 귀사의 포트폴리오 activities does not include both policies with environmental 고객/투자대상 requirements 및 environmental exclusion policies (열 3) This 열 is presented for 하나 이상 selection other than "Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental 고객/투자대상 requirements 및 environmental exclusion policies" in 열 1 "정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities…". Provide a company-specific explanation of why the 정책 프레임워크 귀사의 포트폴리오 activities does not include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies. 만약 "No, but we plan to include environmental requirements 및/또는 exclusion policies in our 정책 프레임워크 in the next two years" is 선택, explain the plan 및 timeframe for implementation.

guidance.text:
The organization has publicly available policies which address environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and opportunities related to the organization and its value chain.
The policies apply organization-wide, and to the organization's value chain where relevant.
Financial institutions have policies which include environmental requirements that clients/investees need to meet.
Financial institutions shall commit, via a publicly available policy, to the immediate cessation of:
All new financial services to projects and companies involved in new coal mines, extensions/expansions of coal mines, or new unabated coal-fired power plants (inclusive of electric utilities and industrial use cases), with the exception of new financing for permanent decommissioning of production activities and capacity; and
All new financial services to new long-lead time upstream oil and gas projects and mid-stream infrastructure dedicated to new long-lead time upstream oil and gas projects.
The applicability of abatement for the purpose of the arrest of financial services to new unabated coal-fired power plants is considered to be at least a 90% reduction of scope 1 and 2 emissions from the associated coal assets of the holding company or project. For carbon capture to be considered part of the 90%, it must be (i) utilized for mitigation products that have century-scale (or greater) lifetimes (i.e., geological carbon capture and storage); and (ii) must not support processes that enable continued fossil fuel extraction and/or development of production capacity.
guidance.textKo: The organization has publicly available policies which address 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및 기회 related to the organization 및 its 가치사슬. The policies apply organization-wide, 및 to the 조직의 가치사슬 여기서 relevant. Financial institutions have policies which include environmental requirements that 고객/투자대상 need to meet. Financial institutions shall commit, via a publicly available 정책, to the immediate cessation of: All new financial services to projects 및 companies involved in new coal mines, extensions/expansions of coal mines, 또는 new unabated coal-fired power plants (inclusive of electric utilities 및 industrial use cases), with the exception of new financing for permanent decommissioning of production activities 및 capacity; 및 All new financial services to new long-lead time upstream oil 및 gas projects 및 mid-stream infrastructure dedicated to new long-lead time upstream oil 및 gas projects. The applicability of abatement 에 대한 purpose 의 arrest of financial services to new unabated coal-fired power plants is considered to be 최소 a 90% reduction of scope 1 및 2 emissions from the associated coal assets 의 holding company 또는 project. For carbon capture to be considered part 의 90%, it 해야 합니다 be (i) utilized for mitigation products that have century-scale (or greater) lifetimes (i.e., geological carbon capture 및 storage); 및 (ii) 해야 합니다 not support 프로세스es that enable continued fossil fuel extraction 및/또는 development of production capacity.

guidance.text:
Exclusion policy: a provision that eliminates bank lending and/or insurance underwriting coverage for certain industries and/or activities based on specific criteria. For investors, it means the exclusion of certain industries/activities from investment portfolios. Exclusion policies may be framed in the context of a financial sector organization's negative screening processes. 
Policy framework: the collection of written policies setting out rules that guide an organization's decision-making processes in relation to its financial activities. Examples of such policies could include credit policy, risk policy, investment, underwriting policy, etc. 
Portfolio : in the context of this questionnaire your portfolio is the entire collection of the core financing activities and insurance policies that you offer. For banking, this is the entire collection of products, securities and loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For asset managers, this is the entire collection of your products and investments that you hold and/or manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds and investments owned and controlled by your company. For investment portfolios, asset managers should consider discretionary investments, those where the company has discretion over investment decisions. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products and insurance policies you provide to your clients.
guidance.textKo: Exclusion 정책: a provision that eliminates bank lending 및/또는 insurance underwriting coverage for certain industries 및/또는 activities based on specific criteria. For investors, it means the exclusion of certain industries/activities from investment 포트폴리오s. Exclusion policies may be framed in the context of a financial sector 조직의 negative screening 프로세스es. 정책 프레임워크: the collection of written policies setting out rules that guide an 조직의 decision-making 프로세스es in relation to its financial activities. Examples of such policies could include credit 정책, risk 정책, investment, underwriting 정책, etc. 포트폴리오 : in the context of this questionnaire your 포트폴리오 is the entire collection 의 core financing activities 및 insurance policies that you offer. For banking, this is the entire collection of products, securities 및 loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For 자산운용사, this is the entire collection of your products 및 investments that you hold 및/또는 manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds 및 investments owned 및 controlled by your company. For investment 포트폴리오s, 자산운용사 해야 합니다 consider discretionary investments, those 여기서 the company has discretion over investment decisions. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products 및 insurance policies you provide to your clients.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies' NOT completed - 0/7 points
A maximum of 0/7 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' NOT 완성 - 0/7 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/7점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
Points will be awarded per row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
ROUTE A)
Any of the following options selected in column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies' - 2 points
- 'Yes, our policies include environmental requirements that clients/investees need to meet'
- 'Yes, we have exclusion policies for industries, activities and/or locations exposed or contributing to environmental risks'
- 'Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental client/investee requirements and environmental exclusion policies'
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, but we plan to include environmental requirements and/or exclusion policies in our policy framework in the next two years' selected in column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies' - 1/2 points
A maximum of 1/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies' NOT completed - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: Awareness 점수를 획득하려면 Disclosure에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 다음 기준에 따라 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 행별로 점수가 부여됩니다: 경로 A) 하나 이상 의 following options 선택 in 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' - 2 점 - 'Yes, our policies include environmental requirements that 고객/투자대상 need to meet' - 'Yes, we have exclusion policies for industries, activities 및/또는 locations exposed 또는 contributing to environmental risks' - 'Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental 고객/투자대상 requirements 및 environmental exclusion policies' 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'No, but we plan to include environmental requirements 및/또는 exclusion policies in our 정책 프레임워크 in the next two years' 선택 in 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' - 1/2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/2점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' NOT 완성 - 0/4 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/4점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
Points will be awarded per row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
ROUTE A)
'Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental client/investee requirements and environmental exclusion policies' selected in column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Yes, our policies include environmental requirements that clients/investees need to meet' OR 'Yes, we have exclusion policies for industries, activities and/or locations exposed or contributing to environmental risks' selected in column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies' - 1.5/2 points
A maximum of 1.5/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies' NOT completed - 0/6 points
A maximum of 0/6 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: Management 점수를 획득하려면 Awareness에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. 다음 기준에 따라 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 행별로 점수가 부여됩니다: 경로 A) 'Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental 고객/투자대상 requirements 및 environmental exclusion policies' 선택 in 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' - 2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'Yes, our policies include environmental requirements that 고객/투자대상 need to meet' 또는 'Yes, we have exclusion policies for industries, activities 및/또는 locations exposed 또는 contributing to environmental risks' 선택 in 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' - 1.5/2 점 A 최고 of 1.5/2 점 is available for this 경로. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' NOT 완성 - 0/6 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/6점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
Any option excluding both 'No, but we plan to...' AND 'No, and we do not...' must be selected in column 'Policy framework...' in all rows to be eligible for Leadership points.
Points will be awarded per row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
ROUTE A)
'Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental client/investee requirements and environmental exclusion policies' selected in column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Either option 'Yes, our policies include environmental requirements that clients/investees need to meet' OR 'Yes, we have exclusion policies for industries, activities and/or locations exposed or contributing to environmental risks' selected in column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies'
AND
Column 'Explain why the policy framework for your portfolio activities does not include both policies with environmental client/investee requirements and environmental exclusion policies' completed - 0.5/1 points
A maximum of 0.5/1 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Policy framework for portfolio activities include environmental requirements for clients/investees, and/or exclusion policies' NOT completed - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 하나 이상 option 제외 both 'No, but we plan to...' 그리고 'No, 및 we do not...' 해야 합니다 be 선택 in 열 '정책 프레임워크...' in all 행 to be 획득 가능 for Leadership 점. 다음 기준에 따라 공개된 행 수에 비례하여 행별로 점수가 부여됩니다: 경로 A) 'Yes, our framework includes both policies with environmental 고객/투자대상 requirements 및 environmental exclusion policies' 선택 in 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) Either option 'Yes, our policies include environmental requirements that 고객/투자대상 need to meet' 또는 'Yes, we have exclusion policies for industries, activities 및/또는 locations exposed 또는 contributing to environmental risks' 선택 in 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' 그리고 열 '그 이유를 설명 the 정책 프레임워크 귀사의 포트폴리오 activities does not include both policies with environmental 고객/투자대상 requirements 및 environmental exclusion policies' 완성 - 0.5/1 점 A 최고 of 0.5/1 점 is available for this 경로. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 '정책 프레임워크 for 포트폴리오 activities include environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및/또는 exclusion policies' NOT 완성 - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다.

simpleHelpKo: Considering environmental issues in an 조직의 정책 프레임워크 is an important element of 사업전략 및 a signal of how deeply environmental issues are embedded in an 조직의 프로세스es. 에 대한se reasons, 데이터 사용자 are interested in understanding whether organizations in the financial services sector have integrated environmental requirements for 고객/투자대상, 및 whether financial institutions have implemented 하나 이상 environmental exclusion policies.
